message:
ci: improve GitHub Actions workflows with best practices

Key improvements to test.yml:
- Add explicit permissions block (principle of least privilege)
- Pin Bun version to 1.1.38 for reproducible builds (was using 'latest')
- Add dependency caching for Bun (~/.bun/install/cache)
- Add Playwright browser caching to speed up E2E tests
- Add timeout-minutes to all jobs to prevent runaway builds
- Remove redundant 'bun run test' step (test:coverage already runs tests)
- Update codecov-action from v4 to v5

Key improvements to release.yml:
- Move Bun version to env var for consistency with test.yml
- Add dependency caching for faster release builds
- Add timeout-minutes (30 min) to release job

These changes should reduce CI times through better caching and improve
reliability with pinned versions and explicit timeouts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -13,10 +13,15 @@ concurrency:
   group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
   cancel-in-progress: false
 
+env:
+  # Pin Bun version for reproducible builds (must match test.yml)
+  BUN_VERSION: "1.1.38"
+
 jobs:
   release:
     name: Build + Publish Release Assets
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 30
     steps:
       - name: Checkout
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
@@ -26,7 +31,15 @@ jobs:
       - name: Setup Bun
         uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
         with:
-          bun-version: 1.1.38
+          bun-version: ${{ env.BUN_VERSION }}
+
+      - name: Cache Bun dependencies
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: ~/.bun/install/cache
+          key: bun-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('**/bun.lock') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            bun-${{ runner.os }}-
 
       - name: Install dependencies (apps/web)
         working-directory: apps/web

@@ -7,21 +7,40 @@ on:
     branches: [main]
   workflow_dispatch:
 
+# Restrict permissions to minimum required
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+  actions: read
+  checks: write
+
 concurrency:
   group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
   cancel-in-progress: true
 
+env:
+  # Pin Bun version for reproducible builds across all jobs
+  BUN_VERSION: "1.1.38"
+
 jobs:
   lint:
     name: Lint
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 10
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Setup Bun
         uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
         with:
-          bun-version: latest
+          bun-version: ${{ env.BUN_VERSION }}
+
+      - name: Cache Bun dependencies
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: ~/.bun/install/cache
+          key: bun-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('**/bun.lock') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            bun-${{ runner.os }}-
 
       - name: Install dependencies
         working-directory: apps/web
@@ -34,28 +53,34 @@ jobs:
   unit-tests:
     name: Unit Tests
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 15
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Setup Bun
         uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
         with:
-          bun-version: latest
+          bun-version: ${{ env.BUN_VERSION }}
+
+      - name: Cache Bun dependencies
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: ~/.bun/install/cache
+          key: bun-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('**/bun.lock') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            bun-${{ runner.os }}-
 
       - name: Install dependencies
         working-directory: apps/web
         run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
 
-      - name: Run unit tests
-        working-directory: apps/web
-        run: bun run test
-
+      # Note: test:coverage already runs all tests, no need to run test separately
       - name: Run unit tests with coverage
         working-directory: apps/web
         run: bun run test:coverage
 
       - name: Upload coverage to Codecov
-        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4
+        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v5
         # Don't fail CI on Codecov upload issues (external service)
         continue-on-error: true
         with:
@@ -74,13 +99,22 @@ jobs:

     name: Build
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 15
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Setup Bun
         uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
         with:
-          bun-version: latest

+      - name: Cache Bun dependencies

       - name: Install dependencies
         working-directory: apps/web
@@ -93,23 +127,47 @@ jobs:
   e2e-tests:
     name: E2E Tests
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 20
     needs: [build]
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Setup Bun
         uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
         with:
-          bun-version: latest
+          bun-version: ${{ env.BUN_VERSION }}
+
+      - name: Cache Bun dependencies
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: ~/.bun/install/cache
+          key: bun-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('**/bun.lock') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            bun-${{ runner.os }}-
 
       - name: Install dependencies
         working-directory: apps/web
         run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
 
+      - name: Cache Playwright browsers
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        id: playwright-cache
+        with:
+          path: ~/.cache/ms-playwright
+          key: playwright-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('**/bun.lock') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            playwright-${{ runner.os }}-
+
       - name: Install Playwright browsers
+        if: steps.playwright-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
         working-directory: apps/web
         run: bunx playwright install --with-deps chromium
 
+      - name: Install Playwright system dependencies
+        if: steps.playwright-cache.outputs.cache-hit == 'true'
+        working-directory: apps/web
+        run: bunx playwright install-deps chromium
+
       - name: Run E2E tests (Chrome only for CI)
         working-directory: apps/web
         run: bunx playwright test --project=desktop-chrome
